SleepingSpot.title: Sleeping spot
SleepingSpot.description: A simple and uncomfortable rescue or sleeping spot for one humanoid.

SleepingBag.title: Sleeping bag
SleepingBag.description: A warm but relatively uncomfortable place for one humanoid to sleep.

SingleBed.title: Single bed
SingleBed.description: A warm and comfortable place for one humanoid to sleep.

DoubleBed.title: Double bed
DoubleBed.description: A warm comfortable place for two humanoids to sleep, side by side.

SmallAnimalBed.title: Animal bed
SmallAnimalBed.description: A comfortable place for a small animal to sleep.

HospitalBed.title: Single hospital bed
HospitalBed.description: A warm and comfortable place for one humanoid to rest and recover from any injuries/illnesses.

CryoPod.title: Cryo pod
CryoPod.description: Cryonically freezes creatures, preventing ageing for as long as this equipment has power.

SmallTable.title: Small table
SmallTable.description: A small and relatively comfortable table to eat at. A vast improvement from eating off the floor.

MediumTable.title: Medium table
MediumTable.description: A relatively comfortable table to eat at. A vast improvement from eating off the floor.

LargeTable.title: Large table
LargeTable.description: A large and relatively comfortable table to eat at. A vast improvement from eating off the floor.

BedSideTable.title: Bedside table
BedSideTable.description: A small bedside table. Can be placed in crew quarters to improve room quality.

Dresser.title: Dresser
Dresser.description: A dresser which can be placed in crew quarters to improve room quality.

Chair.title: Chair
Chair.description: A relatively comfortable place to sit.

Stool.title: Stool
Stool.description: Marginally better than sitting on the floor.

CaptainsChair.title: Captain's chair
CaptainsChair.description: A chair suitable for a Ship's Captain.

CommandChair.title: Command chair
CommandChair.description: A chair commonly used in a ship's bridge.

FloorLight.title: Floor light
FloorLight.description: A standard light built in to the floor.

StandingLight.title: Standing light
StandingLight.description: A standard light that stands on the floor.

AlarmFloorLight.title: Alarm floor light
AlarmFloorLight.description: A red flashing light that is built in to the floor.

ConcreteFloor.title: Concrete floor
ConcreteFloor.description: An extremely heavy flooring used in large crafts. Must be placed on top of structural flooring.

CarpetFloor.title: Carpet
CarpetFloor.description: A very comfortable luxury carpet. Must be placed on top of structural flooring.

WoodFloor.title: Wooden flooring
WoodFloor.description: A comfortable type of flooring made from wood. Must be placed on top of structural flooring.

Door.title: Door
Door.description: A basic manual door. It will leak atmosphere when in direct contact with external space.

AutoDoor.title: Automatic Door
AutoDoor.description: A powered automatic door that can be used unpowered, but will be slower to operate. It will leak atmosphere when in direct contact with external space.

ArmouredDoor.title: Armoured door
ArmouredDoor.description: A powered automatic and reinforced door that can be used unpowered, but will be slower to operate. It will leak atmosphere when in direct contact with external space.
